subject: fix: full audit sweep — 15 fixes across security, UX, performance, hygiene, docs
body:
Security:
- Gate debug system behind __DEV__ (debugLog.ts, _layout.tsx) — debugAdd()
  is now a no-op in production, global error capture only registers in dev,
  DebugPill only loads in dev via conditional require
- Gate Admin menu item on session && isAdmin (BurgerMenu.tsx) — previously
  visible to all users

Dead code removal:
- Delete InstallPrompt.tsx and UpdatePrompt.tsx — replaced by PWABanner
- Update stale PWA comment in _layout.tsx

UX / Accessibility (WCAG AA touch targets):
- BottomSheet handle: 32px → 44px
- PWABanner action/dismiss buttons: 32px → 44px
- FuelTypeSelector chips: add min-h-[44px]
- RadiusSelector chips: add min-h-[44px]
- StationList sort toggles: add min-h-[44px]
- BottomSheet handle opacity: 0.4 → 0.55 (better visibility on light themes)
- FlatList paddingBottom: 20 → 40 (safe area for notched devices)

Performance:
- Memoize Animated.interpolate values in home screen (useMemo)
- Stable sort tiebreaker by station ID (prevents list jumping)
- Stable renderItem + keyExtractor via useCallback (preserves React.memo)
- FuelMapWeb: split user marker into position effect + color effect
  (prevents full DOM rebuild on theme change)
- useTheme: remove redundant combo/isDark from effect deps (was double-firing)

Code quality:
- Extract magic numbers to src/constants/config.ts (debounce, timeouts,
  thresholds, buffer sizes)
- PWABanner: add timer ref + cleanup for setTimeout (prevents setState
  after unmount)
- Cross-tab theme sync: log malformed JSON instead of silent catch

Documentation:
- USER_GUIDE.md: fix theme combo names (was Teal/Nature/Nordic/Bold,
  actual: Forest/Nordic/Corporate/Cafe/Silk, count: 5 not 4)
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: fix theme combo test scenario to match actual names

Tags: audit, security, accessibility, performance, hygiene, documentation
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch
